summary: Removed the standalone Today Focus dashboard section and moved current Focus behavior into Continue. Continue now derives current Focus rows, avoids duplicate source-backed Focus rows, and exposes Focus status actions from Focus-backed Continue rows.
recommended_next_reason: Stop for review after correcting the Today surface contract and adding a lint guard against the standalone Focus section returning.

contract_status_changes.contract: Legacy handoff schema backfill for today-continue-owns-focus-surface
contract_status_changes.before: Legacy handoff predated explicit proof, residual risk, repo cleanliness, and mirror status fields.
contract_status_changes.after: Backfilled only from the existing handoff summary, validation trail, and recorded risks; product history and proof claims were not upgraded beyond the evidence.

residual_risks: No manual simulator visual pass was performed to confirm the Continue row affordances are discoverable enough.
Previous Days can still show historical Focus sections because those are review records, not the active Today dashboard.
